data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, West Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Western Sarawak and Lahad Datu until 9:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor Barat, Pahang, Terengganu, Sarawak Barat dan Lahad Datu sehingga 9:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of southeastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, southern part of Condore, southeastern part of Bunguran, Reef North, southern part of Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 9:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan tenggara Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, selatan Condore, tenggara Bunguran, Reef North, selatan Reef South, Layang-Layang, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 9:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Yan and Kuala Muda);  Penang ;  Perak  (Kerian);  Pahang  (Jerantut, Kuantan and Pekan); and  Johor  (Tangkak, Muar, Batu Pahat and Pontian) until 8:00AM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu, Kota Setar, Yan dan Kuala Muda);  Pulau Pinang ;  Perak  (Kerian);  Pahang  (Jerantut, Kuantan dan Pekan); dan  Johor  (Tangkak, Muar, Batu Pahat dan Pontian) sehingga 8:00 pagi; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
